name: Coco-Carmel Toast
recipeIngredient: 4 slices White, whole wheat, or raisin bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Combine brown sugar, flaked coconut, and soft butter in a bowl.
3. Toast the bread slices. Spread each slice with the brown sugar mixture.
Place them on an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Bake in the preheated oven at 325 degrees for 10 minutes.
